steps: Open the app without purchasing any subscription
Navigate to the main meditation library
tests.expected_result: The selected core meditation session opens and can be played without a payment gate.

tests.scenario: Free Session Playback for Signed-Out User
steps: Install and open the app on a fresh device
Remain signed out or on a free account
Attempt to play a core guided session
tests.expected_result: The core guided session plays successfully without requiring payment.

tests.scenario: Donation Prompt Does Not Block Playback
steps: Trigger any available donation prompt or navigate past a donation banner during use
tests.expected_result: Meditation playback continues and the user can dismiss the donation prompt without blocking the session.

steps: Ignore the donation option and continue into content
tests.expected_result: The user can continue to meditation content without being forced to donate.
A clearly labeled beginner section is visible.
At least one guided introductory meditation session is listed.

steps: Count taps while navigating to a beginner session
tests.expected_result: A beginner session starts within three taps from the home screen.

steps: Open the app as a first-time user
Navigate from the home screen to beginner content
tests.expected_result: The path to beginner content is direct and does not exceed three taps.
A sleep category is available in the library.
Stress and anxiety support categories are available in the library.
The session continues playing without freezing, looping, or restarting.
The session continues playing normally through the earbuds.

steps: Open the app while signed in
Check the streak or consistency status
tests.expected_result: The streak or consistency value updates after the session is completed.
The session appears once in the progress record and the streak reflects one completion event.

steps: Open the app while signed in
tests.expected_result: The app displays completed sessions in the user's progress view.
The current streak or consistency status is visible.

steps: Sign in on device A and device B with the same account
Complete a session on device A
Refresh the account data on device B
tests.expected_result: The completed session and progress data appear on device B.

steps: Sign in on two devices with the same account
Complete a session on one device
Open the streak view on the second device
tests.expected_result: The streak value on the second device matches the first device after sync.

steps: Enable airplane mode or disable network
tests.expected_result: The downloaded session opens and plays without network access.

tests.scenario: Only Downloaded Content Required for Offline Use
steps: Attempt to play the downloaded session
tests.expected_result: The downloaded session remains playable offline without showing a network error.
